tree.name: Josh Green
tree.tradeDescription: 6-team Klay Thompson sign-and-trade. Charlotte sent a 2025 2nd (PHI own, #38 Johni Broome) to Dallas and cash to Denver. Charlotte received Josh Green from Dallas, plus Reggie Jackson, 2029 2nd (DEN own), and 2030 2nd (DEN own) from Denver.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#38) via PHI
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Thunder as part of Gordon Hayward trade (PHI own pick)
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally PHI's own 2nd-round pick, acquired from OKC in Hayward deal. Sent to DAL in Josh Green 6-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Gordon Hayward
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hornets traded a 2022 2nd round pick (did not convey) to Celtics for Hayward, 2023 2nd (BOS own), and 2024 2nd (BOS own). Boston also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Former All-Star forward, 4yr/$120M sign-and-trade from Celtics

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own 2022 2nd-round pick, sent to Boston in Hayward S&T. Conditional — did not convey.

assetsGivenUp.name: Trade Exception
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Boston received a $28.5M trade exception as part of the Gordon Hayward sign-and-trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Trade exception generated from Hayward's outgoing salary. BOS used part of it to acquire Daniel Theis from HOU in Feb 2022.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to Denver as part of 6-team trade
